description_long: This lamp features a modern, geometric design with a square, flat light head and a matching square base, both in a muted orange color. The lamp's structure consists of two articulated arms connected by cylindrical joints, allowing for adjustable positioning. The arms are colored green and gray, giving the lamp a contemporary, industrial look. The joints and connectors are robust and appear to be made of metal or high-strength plastic, ensuring stability and flexibility. The lamp head is likely fitted with an LED panel, providing efficient and even illumination. Its compact size and adjustable arms make it suitable for use on desks or workstations in urban environments.
description: A modern, adjustable lamp with a square orange base and head, green and gray articulated arms, and robust cylindrical joints. Its geometric, industrial design is ideal for desks or workspaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full articulation of the green and gray arms and the square orange base and head.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the alignment of the arms and the symmetry of the square head and base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the articulated joints and the lamp's adjustable structure.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the lamp head and the straight alignment of the arms.
